title: Thumbtack Integration
excerpt:
Hi everyone, I’m trying to integrate a lead generation service that I use, called Thumbtack. Similar to Home Advisor, Angies List, etc. 
They have an API that will let you sync leads with your crm, and I’m pretty new to …

posts.author: Dhuso11 (Dallin Huso)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone, I’m trying to integrate a lead generation service that I use, called Thumbtack. Similar to Home Advisor, Angies List, etc.
They have an API that will let you sync leads with your crm, and I’m pretty new to this so I was hoping somebody could help walk me through the process? Here is the link for the Thumbtack API:
https://pro-api.thumbtack.com/docs/#introduction

Again I’m trying to integrate it with Monday.com so when a lead comes through, it automatically pops up in my dashboard here. Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dhuso11, welcome to the community!

I would be more than happy to help answer any questions you had about integration monday.com with Thumbtack. Have you had a chance to start setting things up yet? Or are you starting completely from scratch?

If it helps, you could also write into appsupport@monday.com with more specific questions and screenshots of your workflow if you’d prefer.

-Helen

posts.author: Dhuso11 (Dallin Huso)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I’m starting completely from scratch, I would appreciate any help you can provide to walk me through the process.
Thanks!

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dhuso11,

How’s it going? Are you still looking to get started?

While I’m unable to walk you through the entire process of setting up the integration, I would be more than happy to provide advice/guidance and answer any questions you had along the way.

If you’re looking for a no-code required platform, I would definitely recommend checking out Zapier and Integromat, and our community section there as you get started: FAQs - No-Code (Zapier, Integromat, etc) - monday Community Forum!

-Helen

posts.author: Dhuso11 (Dallin Huso)
posts.cookedHtml: There is no zapier integration for thumbtack. Is there anyway to plug the thumbtack api into monday?

posts.author: gunturhakim (guntur hakim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, thanks Helen, for sharing complete guide for the integration, my company really love the monday and my working really manage not crowded as before.
thanks

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dhuso11,

Yes! You can either utilize Integromat (which I personally like better than Zapier) as an alternative, or you can build a monday.com custom integration yourself (although this would be a lot more technical and require you to code yourself).

Get started with Integromat though, and let me know if that helps!

-Helen

posts.author: Dhuso11 (Dallin Huso)
posts.cookedHtml: Like I mentioned on my last email, there is no Zapier integration for Thumbtack. How would I go about adding it to Integromat?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dhuso11,

Sorry-- typo! Meant Integromat.

A quick search online showed me that Integromat sadly doesn’t host Thumbtack. However, there are lots of integration platforms other than just Zapier and Integromat that could work?

At this point I would consider two options:

  1. reach out to Thumbtack support and see if they have any pieces of advice for which platforms they suggest building integrations from
  2. consider hiring a monday.com technical specialist who will build out the custom integration for you

Feel free to check out our technical requests section of our community here: Hire an Expert - monday Community Forum.

-Helen

posts.author: Dhuso11 (Dallin Huso)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks.
Thumbtack does have a custom api that is meant for softwares and CRM’s such as Monday, I just don’t know where I would plug the API into Monday. Is it only possible through coding?
https://pro-api.thumbtack.com/docs/#introduction

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes! So in this case you would want to build your own app within monday.com that’s able to call and consequently utilize the Thumbtack API.

However, this would take quite a large degree of technical effort on your end (i.e. building out a program that does this, finding a server to host your program on, etc).

But it’s absolutely possible!
